summary: Delivery tracking app with customer portal (Internet Identity login, product catalog, delivery history, feedback on incorrect deliveries) and admin panel (delivery management, flagged feedback dashboard, status updates).
architectural_notes: Only admins can update delivery statuses; customers can only submit feedback
Customer feedback on disputed deliveries creates a flag visible in the admin panel for investigation
Authentication via Internet Identity (passkeys, Google, Apple)
known_issues: Build has failed multiple times with AI/platform errors; may need to be simplified for successful deployment

existing_features.title: Create a customer-facing portal as a separate route (/customer) in the React app. The portal must require Internet Identity login. Once logged in, customers see: (1) a full product catalog page, (2) their personal delivery history listing completed and missed deliveries, and (3) a feedback form on any delivery marked 'delivered'.

Add a 'Flagged Feedback' section to the existing admin panel (accessible only when logged in as admin). Display a list of all flagged customer feedback with delivery details, customer message, and a button to update the delivery status after investigation.

new_feature_requests.summary: Customer portal with Internet Identity login, full product catalog view, personal delivery history (completed & missed), and feedback form for incorrectly marked deliveries
Admin panel with delivery management, status updates, flagged feedback dashboard, and manual status correction after investigation

Extend the backend actor to support customer-linked delivery records. Add a 'customerId' field (linked to Internet Identity principal) to existing delivery records so customers can query only their own deliveries.

Add a customer feedback system to the backend. Allow a customer to submit feedback on a delivery that is marked 'delivered' but was not received. Store feedback with fields: deliveryId, customerPrincipal, message, timestamp, and a 'flagged' boolean. Only customers can submit feedback; only admins can read all flagged feedback.
Add an admin function to resolve flagged feedback by updating the delivery status and marking the feedback as resolved. Only the admin principal can call this function.
